summary: internal/cli/pcgs_envelope.go top-of-file docstring expanded with the 3 classifier paths, known-limitation provenance, and a reference to retro issue #1551.
reason: The narrow 4-condition images heuristic isn't obvious from the function body alone. Expanded comment block documents when each path fires, why path 3 has a known false-positive on freshly-graded certs (PCGS API itself doesn't distinguish), and points readers to the broader retro filing.
